site.name: Pradyuman
site.about:
I'm a senior at the University of Texas at Dallas, specializing in character rigging and digital animation. I build rigs that give animators freedom — systems that are technically robust yet intuitive to use.

My work sits at the intersection of engineering and artistry. Whether it's a creature that needs to move believably across terrain or a face that has to carry an entire performance, I approach every project with precision and care.

Currently seeking opportunities in film, games, and visual effects.

projects.title: Restaurant Takeaway Commercial
projects.overview: A social media advertisement created to promote a client's takeaway and delivery services. As the Video Editor and Creative Lead, I edited across multiple post-production tools while shaping the overall creative direction of the commercial. The project was completed in one week, delivering a energetic, engaging commercial optimized for social media platforms.

projects.title: Facial Performance
projects.overview: FACS-based facial rig with blendshape layering and corrective sculpts for cinematic close-up shots.

projects.title: Mechanical Rig
projects.overview: Precision mechanical asset with constraint-driven articulation and automated secondary motion.

projects.title: Creature Deformation Study
projects.overview: Exploration of quadruped locomotion with custom muscle systems and volume-preserving deformation across extreme poses.

projects.title: Motion Capture Cleanup
projects.overview: Retargeted and refined mocap data with hand-keyed polish for a short-form character piece.

projects.title: Character Walk Cycle
projects.overview: Stylized walk cycle with full body mechanics, weight shifts, and follow-through on secondary elements.

projects.title: Acting Shot
projects.overview: A pantomime performance piece focused on silhouette, timing, and emotional readability.

projects.title: Senior Thesis
projects.overview: Capstone project combining original character design, full production rig, and a narrative animation sequence.
